name: @tank/playwright
description: Browser automation and end-to-end testing with Playwright. Covers test writing (locators, assertions, fixtures), auto-waiting, network interception, visual regression, authentication state reuse, parallel execution, mobile emulation, and CI/CD integration. Synthesized from Playwright official docs, Hands-On Playwright (Kelhini/Mayhew). Triggers: playwright, e2e test, browser test, locator, assertion, screenshot, network intercept, fixture, page object, visual regression, mobile testing, accessibility, CI test, browser automation, test runner.
